docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-02-2017 - JUDGMENT.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF FONG, JULIA AS TO DEFENDANT MONKEYBRAINS
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT MONKEYBRAINS

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-02-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-02-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY RUDY RUCKER, MANAGING MEMBER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SEE SIGNATURE ON GREEN CARD) SERVED AUG-17-2017, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MONKEYBRAINS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,600.00 FILED BY FONG, JULIA AS TO DEFENDANT MONKEYBRAINS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-02-2017 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FONG, JULIA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MONKEYBRAINS THE EVIDENCE DOES NOT SUPPORT THAT ANY ACT OR OMISSION BY THE DEFENDANT WAS A CAUSE OF DAMAGE, LOSS OR HARM TO THE PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
